## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Link to the issue or explain the motivation.

## How

High-level approach. Mention any design decisions or trade-offs.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make vet` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run typecheck` pass (if frontend changed)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Config example updated (if applicable)
